raw_job_description:
Data Engineer
Join our analytics platform team to build ETL workflows and scalable data pipelines. You are responsible for Spark jobs, Hadoop ecosystem integration, SQL optimization and Airflow orchestration. Required: SQL, Spark, Hadoop, Airflow, Data Modeling. Preferred: Python and AWS. Senior profile. Full-time remote.
